top_signals.title: Cloudflare Brings Secure, Scalable Sandboxes to Claude Managed Agents
top_signals.summary: New integration combines Anthropic’s intelligence with Cloudflare’s global network to provide a highly secure and scalable foundation for autonomous AI
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
